videos.headline: Michigan's last-ditch effort falls short
videos.description: Michigan State forces five turnovers, gets two scores from QB Brian Lewerke, and stops Michigan in the final seconds to prevail 14-10.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Michigan-Michigan State Final Sotfull) 2017/10/7 ESHEET ENHL

videos.headline: Michigan converts fourth down on opening drive
videos.description: On fourth-and-1 from the Michigan State 28-yard line, Chris Evans pounds through the line to pick up two yards and a Wolverines first down.  The drive would result in a 30-yard field goal.

videos.headline: Spartans force Wolverines fumble
videos.description: Joe Bachie rips the ball out of Ty Isaac's hands and Chris Frey recovers as Michigan State forces the turnover.

videos.headline: Lewerke dives into end zone for Michigan State score
videos.description: Spartans QB Brian Lewerke scrambles through the left side and reaches out to pick up a 14-yard touchdown, giving the Spartans a 7-3 lead.

videos.headline: London beats defenders to pylon to extend Spartans' lead
videos.description: Brian Lewerke throws a screen pass to Madre London who follows his blockers and lowers his shoulder to get into the end zone for a 16-yard touchdown, putting Michigan State up 14-3.

videos.headline: Michigan State in control at the half
videos.description: Two scores from QB Brian Lewerke has the Spartans up 14-3 over the Wolverines.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Michigan State-Michigan Halftime Sotfull) 2017/10/7 ESHEET ENHL

videos.headline: Hill spins at goal line for Michigan TD
videos.description: Khalid Hill gets turned around at the line of scrimmage, but powers through to score from one yard out, cutting the Michigan State lead to four.

videos.headline: Spartans tip pass, pick it off
videos.description: John O'Korn's pass is knocked in the air and intercepted by David Dowell who returns it back 17 yards down to the Michigan 42-yard line.

videos.headline: Michigan's O'Korn muffs snap, throws INT
videos.description: Playing in heavy rain, Wolverines QB John O'Korn mishandles the snap and then has his pass intercepted by Joe Bachie.  The interception is O'Korn's second of the game, and the Wolverines' fourth turnover of the contest.

videos.headline: O'Korn's rough day continues with third INT
videos.description: Michigan QB John O'Korn throws an interception for the third possession in a row, and after the play is over he takes a tumble on the sideline.

videos.headline: Lewerke drops snap, recovers to scramble for third-down conversion
videos.description: On third down, Michigan State QB Brian Lewerke muffs the snap, but picks up the ball and rushes through the left side, rolling over a defender to pick up four yards and a first down.

videos.headline: Michigan's failed Hail Mary seals Michigan State's victory
videos.description: In a last-ditch effort , John O'Korn hurls a deep pass to the end zone, but the pass falls incomplete as time expires to give the Spartans a 14-10 win.

videos.headline: Michigan State stuns Michigan
videos.description: The Spartans record five turnovers and the Wolverines are not able to convert a late Hail Mary, which sends Michigan State to another shocking win at the Big House.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Michigan State stuns Michigan) 2017/10/8 ESHEET SCEU

videos.headline: MSU's Stewart makes juggling catch in traffic
videos.description: Darrell Stewart Jr. leaps up and tips the ball to himself between two Wolverine defenders to secure a 30-yard catch.

videos.headline: London bursts out of the backfield for 50-yard Spartans gain
videos.description: Madre London cuts through a hole at the line of scrimmage and jukes a Wolverines defender to rip off a huge gain, getting all the way down to the Michigan 33-yard line.

videos.headline: Michigan converts on third down, but coughs up ball
videos.description: On third-and-12, John O'Korn connects with Sean McKeon for a 36-yard gain, but Justin Layne knocks the ball loose and Michigan State's David Dowell recovers to force the turnover.

videos.headline: Brutal Michigan drop dooms comeback effort
videos.description: Trailing by four with under a minute remaining, John O'Korn's pass to a wide-open Eddie McDoom is dropped.

videos.headline: Michigan's loss will be tough to overcome
videos.description: Heather Dinich says Michigan's loss is more damaging than Oklahoma's due to the five turnovers from the Wolverines.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (Michigan's loss will be tough to overcome) 2017/10/07 SC ESHEET

videos.headline: Dantonio credits strong RB play for first-half lead
videos.description: Michigan State coach Mark Dantonio says his team is leading 14-3 at halftime largely due to the explosive plays provided by the team's running backs.

videos.headline: Dantonio on win: 'You will never have a bus ride home like this'
videos.description: Michigan State coach Mark Dantonio says he's extremely happy for his team after beating No. 7 Michigan, and cites his team forcing five turnovers as the reason for the win.

videos.headline: Spartans hold on to win in the rain
videos.description: Kirk Herbstreit and Chris Fowler break down Michigan State's 14-10 win over Michigan in a heated rivalry game.

videos.headline: Lewerke: Win over Michigan 'feels incredible'
videos.description: Michigan State QB Brian Lewerke praises his team after a win over Michigan, saying the team fought hard and "found a way to win."

videos.headline: Bachie: 'Nothing feels better than bringing Paul back home'
videos.description: Michigan State LB Joe Bachie calls the win against Michigan an "awesome team effort" and says the team is ecstatic to take home the Paul Bunyan Trophy after defeating its rival.

videos.headline: Harbaugh says 'not enough good things' after Michigan's loss
videos.description: Michigan coach Jim Harbaugh knows you can't expect to win when you turn the ball over five times when speaking about loss to Michigan State.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Presser (Harbaugh says 'not enough good things' after Michigan's loss) 2017/10/7
